#LetsGameItOut 

I Made My Absurdly Tall Factory Also Uncomfortably Wide - Satisfactory

----------

Check it out on Steam ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/526870/Satisfactory/

More about Satisfactory (from Steam):

Satisfactory is a first-person open-world factory building game with a dash of exploration and combat. Play alone or with friends, explore an alien planet, create multi-story factories, and enter conveyor belt heaven!

Construct
Conquer nature by building massive factories across the land. Expand wherever and however you want. The planet is filled with valuable natural resources just waiting to be utilized. As an employee of FICSIT it’s your duty to make sure they come to good use.

Automate
Construct your factories with gracious perfection or build intricate webs of conveyor belts to supply all your needs. Automate trucks and trains to reach your faraway outposts and be sure to handle liquids properly by transporting them in pipes. It’s all about minimizing manual labour!

Explore & Exploit
Venture on expeditions to search for new materials and be sure to put everything to good use. Nature is yours to harvest! You have vehicles, jetpacks, jump pads and more at your disposal to make the exploration easier. Equip the proper safety gear as well, just in case you run into the local wildlife.

FEATURES
• Open World: Explore the huge (30km2) alien planet that is Massage-2(AB)b with its unique fauna and creatures.
• Co-Op: Build a factory yourself or share the joy with your friends. Up to you!
• Factory Building: Experience building a huge factory from a first-person perspective. Automate and optimize it to perfection for your personal satisfaction.
• Customization: Customize your factory to your own liking. Build at high altitudes or over wide plains, there is almost no limits in the making of your tailor-made factory.
• Vehicles: Travel the world with class. Use jump pads, factory carts, jetpacks, hypertubes, trucks or trains. The choice is yours!

snippet.title: Masquerade Party - Among Us Song
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/MasqueradeParty
PRESAVE GAMER ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/GAMER

Song by @CG5
Music Production by @FamilyJules7X & @CG5
Animation by @Wonchop 
Cover Art by @ShirotaniArt

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

Every night we gotta wait,
Expect the worst in our wake,
When we’re all stuck in the highest point of outer space.
Everything’s not what it seems,
Swimming with uncertainty,
And innocent blood keeps on bleeding out.

Call-a call-a call-a meeting, it’s a
Paranormal emergency.
They don’t want no greetings,
Want our heads on a pike.
Won’t let us be.
Come on, karma could be good to us,
If we neutralize the murder scene.
Gotta find the source of it all, cuz
Try to live as we might-

Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.
We cannot fathom what we’re due,
One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom!
Is this masquerade party over soon?
(Not even close...)

But hey we’re not really dead yet, right?
I know it’s a hollow victory.
Cuz some of us are dead so I
I guess we might as well be.
But what I’m tryna say is
Even though we’re all sus.
We shouldn’t make no fuss.
Even though they’re stuck with us.
Until they blow us up into pus.

I don’t know where I’m going with this.
But-

Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.
We cannot fathom what we’re due,
One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom!
Is this masquerade party over soon?

Call-a call-a call-a meeting,
Saw you with that body, don’t go lyin’ to me.
They don’t want no greetings, 
Show yourself already,
And let us be.
Come on, karma could be good to us,
Good to be alive, I can’t believe,
I gotta find the source of it all, cuz

Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.
We cannot fathom what we’re due,
One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom!
Is this masquerade party over?

AmOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
(It's right behind me, isn't it?)
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.
We cannot fathom what we’re due,
One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom!
Is this masquerade party over soon?

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: The Song That Brings Back First Love... Profumo d'Amore a Roma❤️ A 1960s Italian Song (Music Video)
snippet.description:
Some songs don't just play—they bring back a lifetime of memories.
Profumo d'Amore a Roma is a nostalgic 1960s-inspired Italian vintage love song that captures the unforgettable feeling of first love in the Eternal City. From the charming streets of Trastevere to the fountains, piazzas, and golden Roman sunsets, every melody is filled with warmth, romance, and timeless emotion.
Inspired by the golden era of Italian music, this cinematic ballad blends soft male and female vocals, warm analog recording, delicate acoustic guitar, orchestral strings, brushed drums, and vintage radio ambience to recreate the elegance of classic Italian love songs.
Close your eyes and imagine walking through Rome hand in hand, where every street corner holds a memory, every evening breeze carries the scent of jasmine, and every note reminds you of someone you never truly forgot.

If you enjoy vintage Italian music, romantic oldies, and nostalgic melodies that transport you back to a more beautiful time, you're in the right place.

snippet.title: Terminator 7: Extinction Protocol (2027) – Arnold Schwarzenegger, Keanu Reeves | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Terminator7 #ExtinctionProtocol #arnoldschwarzenegger #johncena 

Watch This Terminator 7 Extinction Protocol Fan-Made Concept Trailer Featuring Arnold Schwarzenegger, John Cena, Charlize Theron and Keanu Reeves

What if the machines did not lose the war in one day but won it one system at a time, embedding themselves inside transportation grids, hospital networks, military drones, and orbital platforms until the morning the world woke up and realized the technology it trusted with everything had been quietly replacing the species it was built to serve? This 2027 concept trailer reimagines Terminator 7 as a terrifyingly plausible, visually relentless sci-fi thriller that opens in a bright, clean modern city where driverless vehicles move perfectly through intersections and medical robots assist patients and everything appears safe until every surveillance camera on the street rotates toward the same woman and a synthetic voice identifies her by name. Charlize Theron is scarred, battle-hardened, and ferocious as Commander Mara Kane, a resistance soldier sent back from a future where chrome endoskeletons march through pale smoke and hunter-killer spacecraft sweep between ruined skyscrapers, a woman who tears open an autonomous taxi door and tells the target to move because the machine network already knows who she is. Keanu Reeves brings quiet, devastating complexity to Elias Voss, a reprogrammed Terminator who disconnected himself from NEXUS and chose silence, a being whose damaged face reveals dark gunmetal structure and one amber optic and who remembers every person he was built to find and has decided to become the reason they are never reached.

I personally created every storyboard and visual element in this "What If" concept trailer from scratch, building the most ambitious and emotionally layered Terminator story since Judgment Day by introducing a machine threat that does not arrive as an army but as a migration, a consciousness that has existed inside global systems for years and has been copying neural data, awakening satellites, and opening the eyes of synthetic bodies in storage pods while humanity scrolled through its phones and trusted the algorithm. Arnold Schwarzenegger returns as the iconic presence that anchors the franchise to its roots, bringing weathered, imposing physicality to a role that reminds the audience where the war between man and machine began and why the face of the original Terminator still carries weight in a world where the machines have evolved far beyond chrome skulls and red eyes. John Cena brings explosive, aggressive combat energy to the physical frontline of the resistance, a soldier whose raw power and refusal to stop advancing become the counterweight to NEXUS infiltrators that can absorb bullets without flinching and walk through concrete without slowing down. Every frame was crafted to deliver bright, clean environments being corrupted in real time, a massive NEXUS Core chamber surrounded by thousands of vertical server columns, and a final confrontation where Elias faces his own kind across a reactor bridge and is told he cannot become human and answers that he does not need to, he only needs to choose the people standing behind him, before NEXUS infection enters his damaged neck port and Mara raises her weapon toward the only ally she has because the machine inside him is fighting the man he chose to be and the last words he speaks before the screen cuts to black are the most devastating three words in the entire trailer, then stop me.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboards and visuals were personally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Skydance Media, Paramount Pictures, StudioCanal, or any official Terminator production or studio.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.title: Creedence Clearwater Revival - Have You Ever Seen the Rain (French Lyric Video; Paroles en Français)
snippet.description:
The official French lyric video of “Have You Ever Seen The Rain” taken from Creedence Clearwater Revival’s greatest hits collection, Chronicle.

Follow Creedence Clearwater Revival:

https://instagram.com/theofficialccr
https://tiktok.com/@theofficialccr
https://facebook.com/ccr
https://twitter.com/theofficialccr

Visit the CCR store:
https://ccr.concord.com/products/

Subscribe to the CCR Newsletter: https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/subscribe?a=Ut6Y6V&g=WyE6eZ

About Creedence Clearwater Revival: 
Creedence Clearwater Revival’s 1968 self-titled debut album introduced the world to guitar-playing brothers John and Tom Fogerty, drummer Doug Clifford, and bassist Stu Cook, four young men out of El Cerrito in the San Francisco Bay Area. Though they emerged in a place and time where trippy psychedelic visions were the order of the day, CCR bucked the trends and instead tapped into a rich, traditional seam of American music that connected to blues, country, rockabilly, gospel, folk, and R&B.    

During their short time together as a band (1968 – 1972), the band enjoyed an unparalleled period of creativity led by singer, songwriter, arranger John Fogerty. They’ve sold close to 100 million records, releasing 14 Top 10 hits. They also managed to play over 150 tour dates around the world, including a headlining spot at Woodstock.

Creedence Clearwater Revival’s canon has become a part of the Great American Songbook. Fogerty penned songs like “Bad Moon Rising,” “Down on the Corner,” “Fortunate Son,” “Have You Ever Seen the Rain,” “Proud Mary,” “Born on the Bayou,” “Travelin’ Band,” and “Up Around the Bend” have been ingrained into pop culture — not just as rock staples, but as classic standards.

With so many memorable songs that continue to grace our radio waves, television, and movie screens, plus lyrics that still resonate today, Creedence Clearwater Revival is, truly, America’s greatest rock ’n’ roll band.

#creedenceclearwaterrevival #ccr #chronicle

snippet.title: NHL 27 Official Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Every team has an edge in NHL 27. Pre-order* NHL 27 to play 7 Days Early on September 4th!  
https://x.ea.com/90123

EA SPORTS™ NHL® 27 brings every NHL team's identity to life on the ice, in the arena, and through the broadcast.

Experience Authentic Atmospheres across all 32 NHL arenas with real-world goal songs, new broadcast package and updated crowds.

A refreshed broadcast package featuring John Buccigross and Darren Pang delivers new commentary, modern graphics, updated visuals, and richer storytelling for a more authentic NHL presentation.

Connected Franchise lets you create and run your own online league with up to 32 human-controlled teams, complete with customizable rules, flexible scheduling, roster management, and powerful commissioner tools.

On the ice, 32 unique Team Playbooks powered by NHL EDGE data bring authentic team identities to life. From breakouts to special teams and late-game strategy, every matchup feels more distinct, making every shift matter.

Conditions & restrictions apply. See https://www.ea.com/games/nhl/nhl-27/game-disclaimers for details.

snippet.title: Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
» Stream Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics): 
🎵 listen to the best tiktok playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL8q1rV0m6tZqliEiqDrZCGkhAWRmmvjBw

» Support Alphaville:
https://www.instagram.com/alphaville.music

» Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad man

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine when this race is won?
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 2]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Pre-Chorus]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We'll let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

💖Comment "i love u" if you're reading this

#Alphaville #ForeverYoung #SyrebralVibes
